query: Run the full review and give me one report with a merge decision.
expected_behavior: Collects findings[] from the review skills that ran
Deduplicates by ruleId+file+line keeping the highest severity
Sorts critical→high→medium→low→info and renders MD + interactive HTML with filters
Sets [GATE] BLOCKED when any critical/high finding exists, else PASS

query: Two skills reported the same SQL injection on the same line — consolidate.
expected_behavior: Merges the duplicate into a single finding keeping critical severity
Records both contributing skills as sources
Does not double-count it in the per-severity totals

query: Only low and info findings this time — what's the gate?
expected_behavior: Renders the report header as PASS
Still lists the low/info findings in the per-area sections
